title: Understaffing Impact Log Playbook
description: When headcount drops, log ASA, abandon, and percent answered with plain annotations. Fair metrics demand context.

mindset.principle: The minute people get dinged, they want proof the test dinged them fairly. Annotate the week.

mistakes.label: Report ASA without staffing context
mistakes.cost: False dings; floor stops trusting data

mistakes.label: Explain spike as attitude not staffing

decision_branches.situation: ASA crosses goal without obvious cause
Individual ding during known understaff week

agent_signal.use_when: Headcount dropped and ASA/abandon moved. Someone got dinged without week context. Need fair metric proof.
decision_criteria: Annotate every week staffing is below plan.
Attach impact log before individual dings stand.
Pair with correlation pack for leadership narrative.
agent_signal.operator_context: Understaffing log is the fairness layer on raw ACD stats.
agent_signal.not_for: Generic ops: fetch only when use_when matches; do not replace spine chain packs.
trigger_phrases: Headcount dropped and ASA/abandon moved. Someone got dinged without week context. Need fair metric proof.
Need playbook: Understaffing Impact Log Playbook
